overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a gothic-style classroom or great hall from a video game, featuring wooden medieval architecture, long tables with seated students, and natural light streaming through tall arched windows. The scene remains largely unchanged throughout the clip except for a single student walking across the background.

elaborate wrought iron chandeliers hanging from the ceiling beams
long rectangular wooden dining tables arranged in rows
simple wooden benches paired with the tables

exposed dark wooden ceiling beams and rafters supporting the high pitched roof

segments.scene_description: A static view of a gothic-style classroom or great hall with high wooden ceilings, stone walls, and long wooden tables where students in robes sit studying. Natural light streams through tall arched windows on the left. Approximately halfway through the clip, a student walks across the back of the room from left to right, while other students remain seated at their desks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze upon a gothic-style great hall where the stillness of a study session is briefly interrupted by a single movement. It begins with a static view of the classroom, highlighting high wooden ceilings and stone walls while natural light streams through tall arched windows. As the students in robes remain focused and seated at their long wooden tables, the quiet atmosphere persists. The scene then shifts slightly in dynamic as a lone student walks across the back of the room from left to right, before the environment returns to its initial state of scholarly silence.
